reviews.comment:
Muy tontos te cobran y si no pedís ticket, esta bien. Y si pedís se hacen los huevones

(Translated by Google)
They're really stupid; they charge you, and if you don't ask for a receipt, it's fine. But if you do ask, they pretend they don't know what you're getting.
